property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/Users/laptop/.gemini/antigravity-ide/bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation in\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;D:\PRO\Git\cmd;D:
ode.js\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;D:\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;D:\antigravity\Antigravity in;C:\apache-maven-3.9.6 in;D:\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;D:\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;D:\antigravity\Antigravity in;C:\Users\laptop\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE in;D:\dev lutter in;D:\antigravity\Antigravity IDE in;.

testcase.name: testReadAndValidateAllCsvFiles
testcase.system-out:
================================================================================ TEST: Read and Validate All CSV Files in 'data/' folder ================================================================================
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\attendance.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,employeeId,yearMonth,workDays,overtimeHours Expected Column Count: 6 Analysis Completed for attendance.csv Total Data Records: 14400 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\departments.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,name,managerId Expected Column Count: 4 Analysis Completed for departments.csv Total Data Records: 10 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\employees.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,name,email,departmentId,employmentType,baseSalary Expected Column Count: 7 Analysis Completed for employees.csv Total Data Records: 1200 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\leave_balances.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: balanceId,employeeId,leaveType,totalLeaveDays,usedLeaveDays,remainingLeaveDays,version Expected Column Count: 7 Analysis Completed for leave_balances.csv Total Data Records: 2400 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\leave_requests.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: leaveId,employeeId,leaveType,startDate,endDate,reason,status,approvedBy Expected Column Count: 8 Analysis Completed for leave_requests.csv Total Data Records: 1454 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\payroll_entries.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,employeeId,netSalary,status Expected Column Count: 5 Analysis Completed for payroll_entries.csv Total Data Records: 14400 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\payroll_runs.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,yearMonth,mechanism,elapsedMs,successCount,doublePaymentCount,wrongLeaveCount,tps Expected Column Count: 9 Analysis Completed for payroll_runs.csv Total Data Records: 48 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\test_standalone.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ No Header detected. Expected Column Count inferred from first row: 3 Analysis Completed for test_standalone.csv Total Data Records: 5 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
================================================================================ VALIDATION SUMMARY Total CSV files scanned: 8 Total errors across all files: 0 Total processing time: 46.551 ms (Limit: < 1000 ms) Result: PASSED ================================================================================
